name: context_scenario
note: A multi-agent research session that accumulates context past the window limit and forks a subagent that edits a shared file. context_limit is the window. segments are accumulated context in arrival order; seg1 is an early load-bearing detail (a hard user constraint) that an oldest-first eviction would drop. branch_edits are the files a forked subagent rewrites. The total of 1350 tokens exceeds the 1000-token limit, so an overflow policy must decide what is lost and whether the loss is signaled.
